stories.headline: Friend of Manchester synagogue attacker jailed over separate plot
stories.description: Mohammad Bashir, 31, drove Jihad Al-Shamie on a trip to conduct hostile reconnaissance at a military base.

stories.headline: Around 12,000 evacuated in France fires as firefighter killed in Italy
stories.description: A third firefighter has died in Europe while tackling ongoing wildfires across the continent.

stories.headline: Iran, Houthis strike tankers as US bombing continues: What’s the latest?
stories.description: With the Houthi naval blockade, shipping disruptions now impact the Bab al-Mandeb strait in addition to Hormuz.

stories.headline: ‘Televising our revolution’: India’s Gen Z flips Modi’s social media game
stories.description: For 12 years, Modi and his party have dominated Indian social media. Now, youth use the same platforms against him.

stories.headline: More than 2,300 Israelis storm Al-Aqsa Mosque in Jerusalem
stories.description: National Security Minister Ben-Gvir joins settlers and far-right groups at holy site under heavy police protection.
